{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324012131F51E53103B3D5F26AE3C"}"},"total":13},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7475396568098538265","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书书写畅裆、语言通顺、故事情节跌荡起茯比较耐读……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740517039,"group_id":"7438432837755210777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz15y+fgha0M2ex7NuuumlU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"578768725083120","user_name":"爱吃大豆肽的秦芊芊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"578768725083120","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438432837755210777","book_info":{"abstract":"振兴乡村建设美好家园一直都是秦小川的梦想，但当他得到老祖传承后一切都变了。

“什么？他种的樱桃能美容颜养？”

“啊？养的鸭子能滋阴补虚？”

“不可能，种的西红柿还能治胃病？”

“这不算啥，隔壁嫂子生病他还给打针。”

消息传开，投资纷纷找上门。

“神医，您看我女儿体寒这病您能治吗？”

“秦老板，我新开的酒楼价值一个亿，希望能跟您的农场合作。”

“秦老板，我是发展旅游项目的，城市后花园希望您能了解下。”
